title: 3 Facts About Slowest Man on Earth

segments.text: The slowest man in the world walks at 0.2 mph.
And it gets even more interesting.
He has a unique medical condition that slows him down.
But he competes in races, believe it or not!
Is he the ultimate underdog or just having fun?
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: Discover the story of the slowest man! Follow for daily facts! 🐢
